name: Pennant Group, Inc.
business: The Pennant Group, Inc. provides home health, hospice, and senior living services to patients and residents in the United States. As of December 31, 2025, it operated 172 home health and hospice agencies and 63 senior living communities across 16 states. It derives revenue from Medicare, Medicaid, managed care, and private pay payors.

exposures.sentence: Security breaches and other cyber-security incidents could subject us to significant liability.

On December 31, 2025, the Drug Enforcement Administration (DEA) together with the United States Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) issued a fourth extension of the telemedicine flexibilities for prescribing controlled substances through December 31, 2026.

tamClaims.claim: The home health market is expected to grow at a compounded annual growth rate (CAGR) of 8.0% from 2024 to 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: According to Grandview Research, Inc., the home health market is expected to grow at a compounded annual growth rate ( CAGR ) of 8.0% from 2024 to 2030.

tamClaims.claim: The hospice industry is estimated at approximately $37.9 billion and is projected to grow at an estimated CAGR of 8.1% from 2024 to 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: The hospice industry is estimated at approximately $37.9 billion and is projected to grow at an estimated CAGR of 8.1% from 2024 to 2030.

tamClaims.claim: The senior living market is expected to expand at an estimated CAGR of 4.2% between 2024 to 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: The senior living market is expected to expand at an estimated CAGR of 4.2% between 2024 to 2030.
